title: Menschen untereinander
writer: Luise Heilborn-Körbitz, Gerhard Lamprecht, Eduard Rothauser
actors: Alfred Abel, Aud Egede-Nissen, Eduard Rothauser
plot: The "people among us" are Berlin building tenants, a cross section of late 20s society.Among them: a government assessor and his wife,who gives birth while in prison, and a flighty landlady who is swindled by a diamond seller.
